blended.narrative: Le Relais is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 52 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
